cart.deliveryEligible: Subtotal ya vendor ikuyenera free Lusaka delivery — zone itsimikizidwa pa checkout
cart.deliveryHint: Onjezani {amount} kuchokera kwa vendor uyu kuti mukwaniritse free Lusaka delivery
cart.deliveryScopeNote: Imagwira ntchito mkati mwa ma-zones a delivery a Lusaka. Kunja kwa Lusaka, pickup ilipo. Ma-fees a zone amagwirabe ntchito pansi pa threshold.
cart.deliveryThreshold: Free Lusaka delivery kuyambira {threshold} pa vendor
cart.emptyBody: Yang'anani zinthu ndi onjezani items kuti muyambe.
cart.emptyTrustDelivery: Ma-zone a delivery a Lusaka amatsimikizidwa pa checkout musanalipire.
cart.emptyTrustEscrow: Payment ya online imasungidwa ndi Vergeo5 mpaka delivery itsimikizidwe.
cart.emptyTrustPickup: Pickup ya dziko lonse imakhalabe ilipo pamene delivery palibe.
cart.freeDeliveryUnlocked: Subtotal ya vendor iyi ikuyenera free Lusaka delivery
cart.title: Cart yanu
cart.updateError: Sitinathe kusintha chiwerengero. Tabwerera ku amount yomwe inasungidwa.

card.failedBody: Card payment sinapite. Mutha kuyesanso kuchokera ku checkout.
card.heldBody: Sitinathe kutsimikiza payment iyi automatic. Team yathu yadziwitsidwa — musalipirenso mpaka titsimikize.
card.pendingBody: Tikudikira final confirmation kuchokera ku Lenco. Peji iyi idzasintha posachedwa.
card.secureNote: Yotetezedwa ndi Lenco — PCI compliant hosted checkout
card.subtitle: Malizani payment yanu secure pa Lenco. Vergeo5 siimaona zinthu za card yanu.
card.successBody: Order yanu yatsimikizidwa ndipo payment ikusungidwa ndi Vergeo5. Mutha kuona zinthu za order pano.
card.widgetUnavailable: Card payments sizilipo pano. Yesani mobile money kapena yesaninso pambuyo.

payment.cardExplainer: Mukatha kuyika order, mukamaliza card payment pa Lenco secure hosted page. Vergeo5 siimaona zinthu za card yanu.
payment.codIneligible: Cash on delivery ili yokha pa ma-order mpaka {cap}.
payment.codRejected: Cash on delivery silipo pa total iyi ya order
payment.payerHelp: Nambala yomwe idzalandira USSD payment prompt.
payment.paymentsDisabled: Payment ya online silipo pano. Gwiritsani ntchito Cash on Delivery pamene ilipo, kapena yesaninso posachedwa.
payment.subtitle: Payment yanu ikusungidwa bwino mpaka kutumiza.
payment.title: Mungafune kulipira bwanji?

pending.cancelledBody: Mwadana mobile money prompt. Mutha kuyesanso kapena sankhani payment method ina pa checkout.
pending.codBody: Khalani ndi {amount} mu cash pamene order yanu ifika. Courier wathu adzatenga payment pa delivery.
pending.confirmingBody: Talandira signal ya payment ndipo tikutsimikiza order yanu. Izi si final paid confirmation — onani order status pa escrow updates.
pending.retryError: Sitinathe kuyesanso payment. Onani connection ndi yesaninso.
pending.timeoutBody: USSD prompt yatha nthawi isanatsimikizidwe. Onani kuti phone yanu ili ndi network, kenako yesaninso — titumiza prompt yatsopano pa order yomweyo.

checkout.reservationExpired: Reservation yanu yatha — zinthu zabwerera ku cart yanu.

review.consentLabel: Ndikuvomera Terms & Conditions ndi Privacy Policy
review.subtitle: Onani kuti zonse zili bwino musanalipire.
review.title: Onani order yanu

ussd.airtelHelp: Tsekulani Airtel Money prompt pa phone yanu ndi lembani PIN kuti mutsimikize {amount}.
ussd.doNotClose: Sungani peji iyi ili open pamene mukutsimikiza pa phone.
ussd.genericHelp: Mobile money prompt yatumizidwa ku phone yanu. Lembani PIN kuti mutsimikize {amount}.
ussd.mtnHelp: Tsekulani MTN MoMo prompt pa phone yanu ndi lembani PIN kuti mutsimikize {amount}.
ussd.subtitle: Tsimikizani prompt ya {amount} pa phone yanu kuti mumalize payment.
ussd.title: Onani phone yanu
